summary: Recent updates to the Firefox browser's testing mechanisms have enhanced the reliability and accuracy of various graphics and media functionalities. Notably, there has been an adjustment in fuzz testing for Skia (the graphics library), ensuring better compatibility with the latest updates, as well as an increase in Android’s fuzz testing limitations to improve resilience against unexpected errors. In addition, a new end-to-end browser test for **GetKeySystemCapabilities**, which helps manage video playback features securely, was introduced, highlighting a focus on improving media playback consistency. These changes are significant as they bolster the browser's capability to handle graphics and media efficiently, providing a smoother experience for users.
